meta.name: OKR Progress Tracker
meta.description: Aggregate key result updates from Sheets or webhooks, calculate OKR progress scores, flag at-risk objectives, and send weekly status reports.

parameters.content:
## 14 — OKR Progress Tracker

**Required:**
- OKR_SHEET_ID: sheet with columns: objective, key_result, target, current, unit, owner, quarter
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**At-risk threshold:** OKR_AT_RISK_THRESHOLD (default: 0.5 = 50% progress by mid-quarter)
**Schedule:** Every Monday at 08:00

**Status:** Beta.

parameters.subject: 📈 OKR Status Week of {{ $json.week }}: {{ $json.at_risk }} at risk / {{ $json.total_krs }} KRs
